findings.title: AC2 30-day-window implemented as calendar-month membership; ACTIVE_WINDOW_DAYS dead code
No small-N suppression — cohort of 1 reveals an individual's monthly activity
Active-signal query is an unbounded full scan of wallet_ledger (no date/parent bound, no index)
UTC vs EAT month bucketing — codebase-wide convention
activeDefinition param validated but not forwarded (no-op stub)
